name: ASUS VivoBook 15
description: 15.6-inch FHD display with Intel Core i5, 8GB RAM, 512GB SSD. Great for everyday computing and light work.
reviews: Good value for the price, but battery could be better.
Perfect for students and everyday use. Builds quality is solid.
Great screen quality and keyboard, very satisfied.

description: 15.6-inch HD display with AMD Ryzen 5, 8GB RAM, 256GB SSD. Lightweight and portable.
reviews: Decent performance but screen resolution is lower than expected.
Amazing battery life, runs smoothly for browsing.
Fan noise is too loud, heating issues.
Great design and portability for travel.

name: Lenovo IdeaPad Slim 5
description: 14-inch FHD IPS display with Ryzen 7, 16GB RAM, 512GB SSD. Perfect for productivity and creative work.
reviews: Excellent build quality and performance for the price.

Trackpad is a bit small, but overall solid.
Battery life is decent, could be better.

description: 15.6-inch 144Hz FHD gaming laptop with Intel Core i7, RTX 4050, 16GB RAM, 512GB SSD.

Great display refresh rate, very responsive.
Battery drains fast under load, expected for gaming.

name: HP Victus 16
description: 16.1-inch FHD 144Hz gaming laptop with Ryzen 7, RTX 3050, 16GB RAM, 512GB SSD.

Keyboard could be better for gaming.

name: Apple MacBook Air M2
description: 13.6-inch Liquid Retina display with Apple M2 chip, 8GB RAM, 256GB SSD. Premium ultrabook.

Very expensive, only 8GB RAM is limiting.
Build quality is exceptional, best in class.
